description_long: This is a cylindrical can of Dr Pepper, a carbonated soft drink, with a deep maroon background and prominent white and red branding. The front of the can features the large Dr Pepper logo, the phrase 'Est. 1885', and a circular motif with '23' indicating the blend of flavors. The can's surface is metallic and glossy, with a standard pull-tab opening on the top. One side displays a detailed nutrition facts panel, barcode, and recycling information in white text. The can is typical of those found in urban environments, such as vending machines, convenience stores, or discarded as litter.
description: A glossy maroon Dr Pepper soda can with bold white and red branding, nutrition facts, and a metallic pull-tab top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Dr Pepper logo, 'Est. 1885', and '23' flavor blend prominently.
description_view_1: Back view displaying the nutrition facts panel, barcode, and recycling information.
description_view_2: Side view with partial logo and visible nutrition facts text wrapping around the can.
description_view_3: Angled view highlighting the Dr Pepper logo and the can's metallic sheen.
attribute_brand_logo: The Dr Pepper logo is prominently displayed on the front, featuring bold white text with a red outline on a maroon background, accompanied by a circular '23' motif.
attribute_flavor_indication: '23' blend of flavors indicated by a circular motif on the front; no specific flavor named.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutrition facts panel, calorie count, and ingredients are visible on the back side of the can.
